name: KodeCite.ai
description: KodeCite builds AI-readable website infrastructure for businesses that need to be understood, verified, and trusted by AI systems.
positioning: AI-readable website infrastructure practice. We rebuild and restructure business websites so AI systems can understand the business clearly, verify its identity, and trust its claims through corroborated sources.

framework.name: CVT
framework.summary: Clarity, Verification, Trust. Trust is not what a business claims. Trust is what AI can corroborate.
framework.clarity: AI can understand who the business is, what it does, where it serves, and what each page means.
framework.verification: AI can confirm the business identity across trusted profiles, directories, reviews, credentials, and structured data.
framework.trust: AI can corroborate claims through credible third-party sources, reviews, credentials, locations, citations, and schema relationships.

capabilities.name: Foundation Build
capabilities.description: A complete AI-readable website rebuild — technical foundation, entity graph alignment, answer-first structure, and authority signals — on owned GitHub/Vercel infrastructure with no platform lock-in. Built once. Owned forever.

capabilities.name: SEO + AI Visibility Consulting
capabilities.description: A scoped audit and strategy plan for businesses with an existing site that needs diagnosis, structure, and AI visibility guidance.

capabilities.name: Content Architecture
capabilities.description: A structure plan for what a site should say, how pages should connect, and how AI systems should read it.

capabilities.name: Machine Read
capabilities.description: A free, plain-English report on what AI systems can and can't understand, verify, and trust about a business right now — across Clarity, Verification, and Trust.

principles: Scoped engagements with a clear handoff.

resources.title: Start Here (FAQ)
resources.topic: Plain-English answers to the questions a business owner actually has about AI search, entity graphs, and getting recommended by AI.

resources.title: Services
resources.topic: Foundation Build, SEO + AI Visibility Consulting, and Content Architecture — how KodeCite makes a website understandable to AI.

resources.title: What Is an Entity Graph
resources.topic: The definitive explainer on entity graphs and machine-readable business identity.

resources.title: Schema Markup: The Complete Guide
resources.topic: How to build a Schema.org entity graph correctly.

resources.title: Why Your Website Can't Talk to AI
resources.topic: Why traditional sites are illegible to AI systems and how to fix it.

resources.title: Why Now
resources.topic: The urgency case for building machine-readable infrastructure before AI-driven discovery fully consolidates.

primary_cta.label: Run a free Machine Read
primary_cta.description: A free, plain-English report on what AI systems can and can't understand, verify, and trust about your business right now — across Clarity, Verification, and Trust. No pitch required.
